issues.sample: Took my 2020 BMW 7 Series into BMW San Diego because there was fluid leaking. Upon diagnosis at the dealership, I was notified I needed to replace the front differential as it was coming apart. The leaking fluid was identified as differential fluid.  The vehicle has 54,308 miles

narrative.headline: What 2020 Bmw 7 Series owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (25% of reports).
